title: Spicy Thai Flatbread
description: A delicious and spicy Thai-inspired flatbread, perfect for a snack or as a side dish. The combination of fiery peppers and yellow curry flavors will leave you wanting more.
instructions: Place the flatbread on a baking sheet.
Mix the yellow curry paste and sliced peppers.
Spread the curry-pepper mixture evenly over the flatbread.
Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy.
Remove from oven and top with Greek yogurt.
Return to oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the yogurt is slightly golden.
Remove from oven and serve hot.
